---
name: Paid trial intake
about: Scope a paid AI automation or workflow trial
title: "Paid trial: "
labels: paid-trial
assignees: ""
---

## Workflow goal

What repetitive workflow should this automate?

## Current input

What do you have today? Redacted screen recording, sample files, API docs, spreadsheet, CRM, Lark/Feishu table, n8n workflow, etc.

## Desired output

What should the first paid trial produce?

- [ ] field/schema plan
- [ ] working mock demo
- [ ] real API/workflow integration
- [ ] log table / dashboard
- [ ] handoff runbook
- [ ] other:

## Systems involved

List tools and accounts involved, such as n8n, Dify, RAGFlow, Lark/Feishu, Airtable, Google Sheets, CRM, email, browser portal, API.

## Data and access boundaries

Please use redacted samples first. Do not post secrets, passwords, API keys, customer PII, or private account data in this issue.

## Budget range

- [ ] RMB 1500-2000 paid trial
- [ ] RMB 3000-6000 workflow MVP
- [ ] RMB 12000+ one-week sprint
- [ ] Other:

## Timeline

When does the first milestone need to be reviewed?

## Compliance notes

No CAPTCHA bypass, fake reviews, credential harvesting, platform-rule circumvention, or gray-market automation.
